name: LLM Extraction
purpose: Extract products from filtered content using LLM when structural parsing insufficient.
design_intent: LLM receives PRE-FILTERED content (not raw HTML). Fills in implicit names, resolves context from title.
change_impact: LLM prompt receives cleaner input. Skip condition added for high-confidence structural results.

types.stage0Output: Stage0Output from stage-locate-v1 — provides title text for implicit name resolution
types.stage1Output: Stage1Output from stage-classify-v1 — provides postType for prompt context (comparison: extract offer price only)
types.stage2Output: Stage2Output from stage-noise-filter-v1 — provides filtered content + llmRequired flag

required_fields: llmProducts - Array<{ name, duration?, price?, confidence, evidence }>
promptContext - string (what was sent to LLM)

prompt_strategy.title_injection: Always pass stage0Output.titleText for implicit name resolution (e.g., title '유튜브 프리미엄' → body '가족계정 17,000원')
prompt_strategy.content_input: stage2Output.contentForLlm — clean plain text, already filtered by Stage 2. NOT raw HTML.
prompt_strategy.post_type_injection: Pass stage1Output.postType in prompt for comparison posts ('extract offer price only, not reference price')
prompt_strategy.schema_enforcement: Output must be JSON matching LlmProductSchema (Zod-validated)

zod_validation.cross_pair_check: If price_krw and duration_months both present: price_krw / duration_months must be in plausible range (500–50000 KRW/month)
zod_validation.on_validation_fail: Log Zod error, retry once with stricter prompt. If retry fails: return skipped=true.

product_validation.catalog_filter: rejectNonCatalogProducts() - reject products not matching known catalog
product_validation.canonicalization: canonicalizeProductNames() - map names to canonical forms
product_validation.cross_pairing_filter: filterCrossPairedArtifacts() - remove LLM cross-pairing errors (Pain 4 fix)
product_validation.junk_filter: productsLookJunk() - reject generic names without prices

skip_behavior.when_skipped: Return Stage3Output with skipped=true, llmProducts=[], llmConfidence=0

implementation.reuse: Port logic from runTextExtraction() in text-extraction.ts

test_cases.name: Implicit name resolution
test_cases.expected: LLM resolves name from title, llmProducts have canonical names

acceptance_criteria: Skip condition works (no LLM call when llmRequired=false)
Post title always passed to prompt
Test cases TC-3.1 through TC-3.4 pass
